name: MoneyGram
description_short: New York MoneyGram at 475 6th Ave offers money transfers and check-cashing services in Midtown Manhattan.
description_long:
MoneyGram's Midtown Manhattan location sits at 475 6th Ave in New York, within walking distance of major transit hubs and commercial districts. Open 7 days a week from 7 AM to midnight, this standalone MoneyGram branch serves New York residents, commuters, and visitors with convenient extended hours for quick financial transactions.

At this New York location, MoneyGram provides a full suite of money transfer services, bill payment options, and check-cashing for domestic and international transactions. Call +1 800-746-7287 to confirm services, pricing, or transfer details specific to your needs in NY.

If you're a New York resident or visitor needing quick money transfers or check-cashing services, bring a government-issued ID and visit this Midtown Manhattan branch anytime during their extended hours. MoneyGram provides reliable service for international remittances and domestic payments without account setup.
pros: Extensive location network across New York with 200+ cities and towns represented
Omnichannel access—send and receive money online or in person at agent locations
No bank account required, serving unbanked and underbanked populations
User-friendly location finder allowing search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Comprehensive service offerings including money orders, wire transfers, and bill payment
Global reach with 350,000+ locations worldwide for international transfers
Quick in-person transactions without lengthy account setup processes
cons: Fees are not disclosed on the website, making cost comparison difficult for consumers
Transfer speed and processing times are not specified for different service types
No information provided on exchange rates or international transfer costs
Limited online service details—unclear what full functionality is available through their digital platform
Older financial services model that charges fees, unlike modern free peer-to-peer payment apps
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals without traditional bank accounts
Customers needing to send or receive money quickly at physical locations
People making international money transfers to multiple countries
Those requiring money orders, wire transfers, or bill payment services
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those needing physical cash transfer locations without account requirements. The main caveat is that fee structures and complete service pricing are not transparent on their website, requiring customers to visit a location or contact the company directly to understand true transaction costs.
services: In-person money transfer at agent locations
Cash pickup at retail agent locations
meta_description: MoneyGram at 475 6th Ave, New York, NY. Money transfers and check-cashing, open until midnight.
